summary: Coach Watch UI Polish - All tests passed. Backend returns new action-oriented 'What to do now' copy via whyThisMatters field. Frontend displays without italics (font-medium), testid changed from cw-why-this-matters to cw-what-to-do-now, confidence tooltip works on hover.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend: _WHAT_TO_DO_NOW dict (line 143-154) contains new action-oriented copy for all 10 states
Backend: whyThisMatters field name preserved for API compatibility (line 412)
Frontend: Text uses 'font-medium' class instead of 'italic' (line 112) - requirement met
Frontend: ConfidenceBadge component (lines 30-52) implements hover tooltip with correct tooltip text per confidence level
Frontend: Card element order correct: headline → summary → why-line → what-to-do-now → confidence → action
context_for_next_testing_agent: UI Polish complete. Key changes: (1) whyThisMatters copy is now action-oriented ('Act now...', 'Start outreach now...', etc.), (2) testid cw-what-to-do-now replaces cw-why-this-matters, (3) text is NOT italic (font-medium), (4) confidence tooltip appears on hover with correct text per level.
